――兵士を見送ったテルーは、酒場の椅子に座りながら俯いていた。<br>その手は思:
After seeing off the soldier, Telu sat in a tavern chair, head bowed.
Her hand had already reached her crotch without realizing.
（ううっ、どうしよ……したくなっちゃったかも……）: (Ugh... what do I do... I think I've gotten all excited...)
（だ、だって、だって、しょうがないよね！？ ずっと乳首、舐められてたし！<br>:
(But, but... It can't be helped, right? He was licking my nipples for so
long. And watching him cum was my first time too...!)
欲情しているが、相手が誰でもいいわけではない。<br>思い浮かんだのは、もちろん:
She was aroused, but she wouldn't want just anyone. The face that
came to mind was, of course, his.
（司令官に会いに行こうかな……さっきみたいなことしたら<br>喜んでくれるかもだ:
(Should I go see Boss... If I do something like I just did, he might be
happy...)
（うんっ、よし！ 決めた！ 行こう！<br>司令官もお仕事で疲れちゃってるだろう:
(mm-hm! Alright, decision made. Let's go! Boss must be tired from
work too, huh?♪)
そうしてテルーは、足早に司令官室へ向かうのだった。: And so Telu hurried off to the Commander's office.
